name: Masonry Grid Layout
description: A mixed-size card layout with varying heights using card-row and stacked-cards combinations. Combines story-card and principle-card for a visually dynamic but still structured grid.

card_1_title.default: Visual rhythm comes from size contrast, not decoration.

card_1_body.default: Use tall story cards alongside shorter principle cards to create natural visual hierarchy.

card_4_title.default: Each card should earn its place on the page.

card_4_body.default: Avoid filler cards. Every item in a masonry grid should carry real content weight.

variants.name: four-column
variants.html_diff: Add a fourth column to the card-row with an additional story-card or stacked-cards block

variants.name: two-row
variants.description: Two rows of masonry cards for longer content
variants.html_diff: Add a second card-row section below the first
